label: copy-files
command: sim --host 127.0.0.1 --port 7700 exec import shutil, os; src=r'E:\simcli\sim-skills\lsdyna\base\workflows\pydyna_buckling_beer_can\mesh.k'; dst=str(workdir / 'mesh.k'); shutil.copy(src, dst); shutil.copy(r'E:\simcli\sim-skills\lsdyna\base\workflows\pydyna_buckling_beer_can\scripts\bc_data.json', str(workdir / 'bc_data.json')); _result = {'mesh_size': os.path.getsize(dst)}

label: title
command: sim --host 127.0.0.1 --port 7700 exec deck.title = 'Beer Can Buckling 鈥?sim CLI session E2E'

label: contact-mortar
command: sim --host 127.0.0.1 --port 7700 exec ca = kwd.ContactAutomaticSingleSurfaceMortar(cid=1); ca.options['ID'].active = True; ca.heading = 'Single-Surface Mortar Contact'; deck.append(ca)

label: implicit-control
command: sim --host 127.0.0.1 --port 7700 exec deck.extend([kwd.ControlAccuracy(iacc=1), kwd.ControlImplicitAuto(iauto=1, dtmax=0.01), kwd.ControlImplicitDynamics(imass=1, gamma=0.6, beta=0.38), kwd.ControlImplicitGeneral(imflag=1, dt0=0.01), kwd.ControlImplicitSolution(nlprint=2), kwd.ControlShell(esort=2, theory=-16, intgrd=1, nfail4=1, irquad=0), kwd.ControlTermination(endtim=1.0)])

label: database
command: sim --host 127.0.0.1 --port 7700 exec deck.extend([kwd.DatabaseGlstat(dt=1.0e-4, binary=3, ioopt=0), kwd.DatabaseSpcforc(dt=1e-4, binary=3, ioopt=0), kwd.DatabaseBinaryD3Plot(dt=1.0e-4), kwd.DatabaseExtentBinary(maxint=-3, nintsld=1)])

label: parts-materials
command: sim --host 127.0.0.1 --port 7700 exec can_part = kwd.Part(heading='Beer Can', pid=1, secid=1, mid=1, eosid=0); floor_part = kwd.Part(heading='Floor', pid=2, secid=2, mid=1); mat = kwd.MatElastic(mid=1, ro=2.59e-4, e=1.0e7, pr=0.33, title='Aluminum'); mat.options['TITLE'].active = True; can_shell = kwd.SectionShell(secid=1, elform=-16, shrf=0.8333, nip=3, t1=0.002, propt=0.0, title='Beer Can'); can_shell.options['TITLE'].active = True; floor_shell = kwd.SectionShell(secid=2, elform=-16, shrf=0.833, t1=0.01, propt=0.0); floor_shell.options['TITLE'].active = True; floor_shell.title = 'Floor'; deck.extend([can_part, can_shell, floor_part, floor_shell, mat])

label: load-curve
command: sim --host 127.0.0.1 --port 7700 exec import pandas as pd; lc = kwd.DefineCurve(lcid=1, curves=pd.DataFrame({'a1': [0.00, 1.00], 'o1': [0.0, 1.000]})); lc.options['TITLE'].active = True; lc.title = 'Load vs. Time'; deck.append(lc)

label: load-points
command: sim --host 127.0.0.1 --port 7700 exec import json, pandas as pd, numpy as np; bcdata = json.loads((workdir / 'bc_data.json').read_text()); load_nodes = bcdata['load_nodes']; n = len(load_nodes); zeros = np.zeros(n); load = kwd.LoadNodePoint(nodes=pd.DataFrame({'nid': load_nodes, 'dof': np.full((n), 3), 'lcid': np.full((n), 1), 'sf': np.full((n), -13.1579), 'cid': zeros, 'm1': zeros, 'm2': zeros, 'm3': zeros})); deck.append(load); _result = {'n_load_nodes': n}

label: boundary-conditions
command: sim --host 127.0.0.1 --port 7700 exec import json, pandas as pd, numpy as np; bcdata = json.loads((workdir / 'bc_data.json').read_text()); nid = bcdata['bc_nid']; dofz = bcdata['bc_dofz']; n = len(nid); zeros = np.zeros(n); ones = np.full((n), 1); bc = kwd.BoundarySpcNode(nodes=pd.DataFrame({'nid': nid, 'cid': zeros, 'dofx': ones, 'dofy': ones, 'dofz': dofz, 'dofrx': ones, 'dofry': ones, 'dofrz': ones})); deck.append(bc); _result = {'n_bc_nodes': n}

label: extract-energies
command: sim --host 127.0.0.1 --port 7700 exec gke_op = dpf.operators.result.global_kinetic_energy(); gke_op.inputs.data_sources.connect(_data_sources); ke = gke_op.eval().get_field(0).data; gie_op = dpf.operators.result.global_internal_energy(); gie_op.inputs.data_sources.connect(_data_sources); ie = gie_op.eval().get_field(0).data; _result = {'n_states': len(ke), 'ke_max': float(max(ke)), 'ke_final': float(ke[-1]), 'ie_max': float(max(ie)), 'ie_final': float(ie[-1])}

label: extract-displacement
command: sim --host 127.0.0.1 --port 7700 exec import numpy as np; disp_op = model.results.displacement.on_last_time_freq(); disp_field = disp_op.eval().get_field(0); disp_arr = np.asarray(disp_field.data).reshape(-1, 3); norms = np.linalg.norm(disp_arr, axis=1); _result = {'n_nodes': int(disp_arr.shape[0]), 'max_disp': float(norms.max()), 'mean_disp': float(norms.mean())}
